name: ASUS TUF Gaming Z690-PLUS D4 LGA 1700 ATX Motherboard, 15 DrMOS, PCIe 5.0, DDR4 RAM, Four M.2 Slots, 2.5 Gb Ethernet, Front USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C, Thunderbolt 4 Support and RGB Lighting
shortName: ASUS TUF Gaming Z690-PLUS D4 LGA 1700 ATX Motherboard, 15 DrMOS, PCIe
description: ATX gaming motherboard with DDR4 support, PCIe 5.0, and Thunderbolt 4 for Intel 12th-13th gen processors.
